user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] System detected Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected for account Consolidated Messenger. Generating output.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sarah Singh <sarah.singh@consolidated.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-20 11:56 EST
Subject: Re: Re: territory planning Timeline

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with territory planning. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Sarah Singh <sarah.singh@consolidated.com>
Date: 2024-01-18 13:10 EST
Subject: Re: territory planning Discussion - Next Steps

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about territory planning. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: territory planning Discussion - Consolidated Messenger
Date: 2024-03-23
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger), Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft)

[00:01:15] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is territory planning.

[00:07:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on integration complexity and found that the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades.

[00:09:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): On the territory planning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around vendor dependencies.

[00:11:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): On the territory planning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around vendor dependencies.

[00:14:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): The timeline for timeline constraints is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:16:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): The timeline for timeline constraints is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:20:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): On the territory planning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around cost optimization.

[00:22:00] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): The timeline for security compliance is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.
